description: WebMCP Retail demo — accessories store with WebMCP + AG-UI custom agent support

tools.name: view_products
tools.description: Fetches the product catalog from the backend API. Requires an active user session.

tools.name: add_to_cart
tools.description: Adds a product to the shopping cart by product ID and quantity.

tools.name: view_cart
tools.description: Returns the current cart contents and total as JSON. Requires an active user session.

tools.name: remove_from_cart
tools.description: Removes a product entirely from the cart by product ID. Dynamically registered — only available when the cart contains items.

tools.name: checkout
tools.description: POSTs the cart to the checkout API using the user's access_token as a Bearer credential. Requires user confirmation via WebMCP Elicitation before the request is sent. Dynamically registered — only available when the cart contains items.
